Hero.badgeText: Khibrad u yeelo heerka caalamiga ah
Hero.subtitle: Maaliyad Bilaa Xuduud ah. Ku shubo, xawaalad dir, oo ku maamul lacagtaada caalamka oo dhan MurtaaxPay.
Hero.trustText: Waxaa ku kalsoon ururada hormuudka ah

Features.card1Desc: U sameyso biilasha xawaaladdaada si habsami leh adigoo eber kharash ka bixinaya meel kasta oo ganacsi oo Murtaax ah, si degdeg ah, oo runtii bilaash ah.
Features.card2Desc: Si fudud lacag ugu dir dadka aad jeceshay adoo u marinaya adeegyada degaanka ee Zaad, EVC iyo eDahab.
Features.card3Desc: Bangiga u adag sidaada oo kale, isagoo leh taageero buuxda oo degaan ah oo ku dhex jirta abkayaga.
Features.card4Desc: Ku raaxayso dhammaan astaamaha app-kayaga lacag la'aan ($0 cost). Haa, gabi ahaanba bilaash u ah dhammaan muwaadiniinta.

VirtualCard.title: Kharash bixinta Caalamiga ah, La fududeeyay.
VirtualCard.description: Waxaan oggolaannaa 100% lacag bixin sharci darro ah. Ka iibso onlayn meel kasta oo laga aqbalo Visa iyo Mastercard, laga bilaabo Muqdisho ilaa London. Bixi Netflix, Amazon, iyo wax ka badan oo leh eber kharashyo qarsoon.
VirtualCard.label: Sugan & Ammaan ah

Benefits.title: In ka badan bangi uun.
Benefits.subtitle: Baro muujiyeyaal loogu talagalay baahiyaha gaarka ah ee beesha caalamka.
Benefits.fastSafeDesc: Xawaalado degdeg ah oo ay taageerayaan sirta heerka ciidanka si loo ilaaliyo lacagtaada iyo faahfaahintaada.
Benefits.supportDesc: Kooxdayada taageerada ee xaafadda ayaa diyaar u ah markasta oo aad caawimaad u baahato, oo ku hadla English, Somali iyo kuwo kale.
Benefits.murtaaxIdDesc: Lacag isla markiiba ugu dir Murtaax ID kasta si dhib la'aan ah. Looma baahna faahfaahin dheer oo bangi.
Benefits.virtualWalletDesc: Wallet caalami ah oo dhan oo toos ugu jira taleefankaaga. Sugan, la isku halleyn karo, lagana heli karo meel kasta.

Security.title: Amnigu waa hidde-sidaheena (DNA)
Security.subtitle: Waxaan isticmaalnaa qaab-dhismeedka sirta ee horumarsan si loo hubiyo in xawaalad kasta ay 100% sugan tay.
Security.protectionDesc: Kormeerka waqti-dhabta ah iyo ML-ka horumarsan ayaa ka hortaga khiyaanada ka avant intaysan dhicin.

Testimonials.title: Ka maqal
Testimonials.quote: MurtaaxPay waxay ka dhigaysaa lacag u dirista qoyskayga mid aad u fudud. Qiimaha sarrifka waa cadaalad, hawsha oo dhammuna waa mid si habsami leh u socota!
Testimonials.name: Mahmoud Amin

Cta.title: Bilow Dirista Lacagta Maanta
Cta.subtitle: Ku biir kumanaan ka mid ah jaaliyadda Soomaaliyeed ee isticmaala MurtaaxPay baahiyahooda maaliyadeed.

About.title: Dib-u-qeexidda Maaliyadda ee Adduunka Casriga ah.
About.subtitle: Waxaan ku bilownay MurtaaxPay aragti fudud: inaan jebino xuduudaha maaliyadeed oo aan bixino madal sugan oo habsami leh halkaas oo lacagtaadu u socoto sida aad u socoto.
About.transactions: In ka badan 2 milyan oo xawaaladood oo la isku halleyn karo oo ka dhacaya caalamka.
About.securityDesc: Hantidaada waxaa lagu ilaaliyaa sirta hormuudka u ah warshadaha og qufulada biometric-ga.
About.fastDesc: Khibrad u yeelo xawaaladaha caalamiga ah ee degdega ah iyo macaamil ganacsi oo dib-u-dhac la'aan ah.
About.guaranteedDesc: Waxaan nahay kuwo si buuxda u haysta shati, u hoggaansan, lana baadhi karo si aad nabad buuxda u hesho.

Services.title: Wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay, hal super app gudihiis.
Services.subtitle: Laga soo bilaabo xawaaladaha fudud ilaa abaal-marinnada qaab nololeedka. MurtaaxPay wuxuu kuu keenayaa hab deegaan oo dhammaystiran.
Services.capabilityDesc: Ku xoojinta khibradaada {service} farsamo heer sare ah.
Services.ctaTitle: Ma diyaar u tahay inaad barato {service}?
Services.ctaDesc: Ku biir kumanaan isticmaale oo ku kalsoon MurtaaxPay baahiyahooda {service}.

request.title: Lacag Codso
request.description: Habka ugu habboon ee lacag lagu codsado adduunka oo dhan.
request.content: U dir codsiyada lacag bixinta qof kasta, meel kasta oo adduunka ah. Hannaankayaga casriga ah wuxuu hubiyaa inaad lacagtaada hesho si dhakhso ah.

exchange.title: Sarrifka Lacagaha
exchange.content: Hel qiimaha sarrifka ee suuqa ee dhabta ah adigoon lahayn kharashyo qarsoon. Ku kala beddel 40+ lacagood si dhakhso ah.

savings.title: Kaydka
savings.content: Daawo lacagtaada oo koraysa adoo isticmaalaya xisaabaadka kaydka ee faa'iidada badan. Deji hadafyo, la soco horumarka.

investments.title: Maalgashiga
investments.content: Hel fursadaha maalgashiga caalamiga ah. Laga soo bilaabo saamiyada ilaa badeecadaha, ku maamul faylalkaaga hal meel.

sadaqah.title: Sadaqo
sadaqah.content: Ka dhigaysa bixinta sadaqada mid sahlan oo hufan. U hag deeqahaaga sababo la xaqiijiyay.

giftcards.title: Kaadhadhka Hadiyadda
giftcards.description: Hadiyadaha dhijitaalka ah, si degdeg ah loo diro.
giftcards.content: Iibso oo u dir kaadhadhka hadiyadda dhijitaalka ah boqolaal sumadood oo caalami ah. Habeen kasta waa hadiyadda ku habboon.

refer.title: Soo tixraac & Guulayso
refer.content: Lala wadaag waayo-aragnimada MurtaaxPay saaxiibadaada. Hel abaal-marinno tixraac kasta oo guulaysta.

vouchers.title: Foojarrada
vouchers.content: Bixi biilashaada oo dib u buuxi korontada si fudud. Nidaamkayaga foojarku wuxuu daboolayaa biyaha, korontada, iyo internetka.

ServicesPage.title: Wax kasta oo aad u baahan tahay
ServicesPage.subtitle: Laga soo bilaabo xawaaladaha fudud ilaa abaal-marinnada qaab nololeedka. MurtaaxPay wuxuu kuu keenayaa hab deegaan oo dhammaystiran.
ServicesPage.ctaTitle: Ma diyaar u tahay heerka xiga?

request.title: Lacag Codso
request.desc: Habka ugu fudud ee lacag lagu codsado adduunka oo dhan.

Footer.about: Waxaa loo dhisay jaaliyadda caalamka ee qurba-joogta ah. Lacag u dir si degdeg ah, sugan, oo hufan caalamka oo dhan.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Ku biir warsidahayaga si aad u hesho cusboonaysiintii ugu dambeysay.
Footer.rights: MurtaaxPay Ltd. Dhammaan xuquuqaha waa la dhowray. Waxaa loo dhisay beesha caalamka.

PricingPage.subtitle: Khibrad u yeelo daahfurnaanta maaliyadeed iyo waxqabadka sare ee adduunka ugu horumarsan. Ma jirto sir. Kaliya xirfadda bangiyada oo heersare ah.
PricingPage.freePlanDesc: Loogu talagalay qofka bilaabaya safarkooda maaliyadeed. Qalab lagama maarmaan ah, oo bilaash ah.
PricingPage.proPlanDesc: Loogu talagalay muwaadinka caalamiga ah ee dalbanaya ammaan adag iyo dabacsanaan sare.

CardsPage.subtitle: Khibrad u yeelo nidaamka kaararka ee ugu horumarsan adduunka. Si habsami leh ugu dhex milmeen akoonkaaga caalamiga ah ee Murtaax.
CardsPage.interactiveP: Ku muuji aqoonsigaaga maaliyadeed noocyo kala duwan oo kaararkayaga ah.
CardsPage.syncP: Macaamil kasta oo aad samayso ayaa isla markiiba lagu cusboonaysiiyaa jeebkaaga. Ma jiro dib u dhac.
CardsPage.guardP: Lasocodka ML ee horumarsan ayaa hubinaya in kaarkaaga la ilaaliyo 24/7.
CardsPage.ibanP: Kaarkaagu wuxuu la imanayaa IBAN u go'an, oo kugu xiraya shabakadaha lacag bixinta caalamiga ah.
CardsPage.syncWalletP: Ku dar kaarkaaga Murtaax Apple Pay ama Google Pay oo wax ku iibso meel kasta oo adduunka ah.
CardsPage.finalTitle: Ma u diyaarsan tahay mustaqbalka lacagta?

AboutPage.heroSubtitle: Waxaan hadafkeenu yahay inaan duminno caqabadaha oo aan ku xirno qurba-joogta homes-kooda, si nabad ah iyo si degdeg ah.
AboutPage.storyP1: Lagu aasaasay 2024, MurtaaxPay waxay ka dhalatay u kuurgal fudud: u dirista lacagaha xudduudaha waxay wali tahay mid aad u gaabis ah, aad u qaali ah, oo aad u adag.
AboutPage.storyP2: Waxaan dhisnay koox heer caalami ah oo injineero ah iyo khubarada maaliyadda si ay u abuuraan madal ula dhaqanta lacagtaada ixtiraamka ay mudan tahay.

Auth.loginSuccess: Soo galiddu waa guul! Soo dhawoow mar kale.
Auth.agreeTermsPrefix: Markaad isdiiwaangeliso, waxaad ku raacaysaa annaga

ContactPage.title: Halkan ayaan u joognaa inaan ku caawino.
ContactPage.subtitle: Ma haysaa wax su'aalo ah oo ku saabsan adeegyadayada? Kooxdayada taageerada u go'an waxay diyaar u yihiin 24/7 si ay kaaga caawiyaan dhammaan baahiyahaaga maaliyadeed.
ContactPage.emailDesc: Kooxdayadu waxay kuugu soo jawaabayaan muddo 2 saacadood gudahood ah.
ContactPage.callDesc: Laba khad oo u go'an taageerada gobolka.
ContactPage.chatDesc: Si toos ah ula hadal bini'aadam ku jira app-kayaga.
